传闻沈家收养的假千金，是个逃课打架、无恶不作的废物。
被一脚踢回贫民窟后，众人拍手叫好。
谁知——
高冷影帝是她大哥、医界传说是她二哥、全球瞩目的车神是她三哥。
据说，还有几个身份不得了的姐姐……
众人冷笑：“那又如何？再牛的王牌也无法拯救稀巴烂的妹妹。”
下一秒——
商股大佬叫她祖宗。
科技泰斗称她前辈。
顶尖黑客喊她师傅。
帝都最神秘的大佬，更是卑微跪地，轻哄软诱：“给我个名分，嗯？”
整个帝都炸了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/254daa0d862a049948a5e826a36bb891","author":"晚风似火","author_id":"","book_id":"7358013345259064344","book_name":"商爷，夫人黑白两道通杀，您跪吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":844,"name":"真假千金","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=844&name=真假千金&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7358013352137736728","read_count":"138922","title_page_
